should_trigger.prompt: What are the Iron Laws for this project?
Check if my code violates any Iron Laws

should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the code for general quality
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: Is there a rule that says I can't do this?
After fixing the bug, also check if iron laws needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Add a security check to the authorization flow
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
